# setToolbarItemsNeedUpdate()

**Type Method**

Updates the enabled states and badges of toolbar items.

## Declaration

```swift
class func setToolbarItemsNeedUpdate()
```

## Discussion

This method calls the [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariExtensionHandling/validateToolbarItem(in:validationHandler:)] method on the extension’s principal object for each open window. See [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariExtensionHandling].
title: setToolbarItemsNeedUpdate()
